name: Bicentennial Park
description: Bicentennial Park is a place to play pickleball in Grand Blanc, MI. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts can be reserved.

name: Bush Park
description: Brand new courts in Fenton, Super busy since opening. Only problem is the courts are non-reservable, First come first serve. Per City Hall/Parks and rec

name: Cage Fieldhouse
description: Come play pickleball at Cage Fieldhouse in Swartz Creek, MI! There are 12 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Clio Area Senior Center
description: Clio Area Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clio, MI. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Clio Area Youth Sports Complex
description: Clio Area Youth Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clio, MI. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Davison Area Senior Center
description: Davison Area Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Davison, MI. There are 3 courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: DWN
description: Come play pickleball at DWN in Grand Blanc, MI!

name: Ellen Street (World of Wonder) Building
description: Ellen Street (World of Wonder) Building is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fenton, MI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Flint Central Church of the Nazarene
description: Flint Central Church of the Nazarene is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Flint, MI. There are 6 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Genesys Athletic Club
description: Genesys Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Blanc, MI. There are 9 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, restrooms, locker rooms, food, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Grand Blanc Community Senior Center
description: Grand Blanc Community Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Grand Blanc, MI. There is 1 indoor wood court. Chalk lines have been drawn, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $10/year or member of any senior citizen center

name: Grand Blanc High School
description: Come play pickleball at Grand Blanc High School in Grand Blanc, MI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Loose Center
description: Loose Center is a place to play pickleball in Linden, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Shoebox Sports
description: Shoebox Sports is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fenton, MI. There are 9 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Swartz Creek Elms Park
description: Two tennis courts with pickleball lines and tennis nets. Four pickleball courts bring your own net.

name: The CHILL Pickle
description: The CHILL Pickle is a place to play pickleball in Flint, MI. There are 12 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.

name: The MAAC Sports & Fitness
description: Come play pickleball at The MAAC Sports & Fitness in Clio, MI! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: YMCA Flushing, Mi
description: YMCA Flushing, Mi is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Flushing, MI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
